message:
Command `cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

echo "=== Restoring compute_ss.v from git (line 313 has stray 0) ==="
git checkout HEAD -- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v
echo "Restore status: $?"

echo ""
echo "=== Verify line 313 is now blank ==="
sed -n '311,315p' mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | cat -n

echo ""
echo "=== Also check wrapper.v is still patched (amuxbus ports removed) ==="
grep -c "inout.*amuxbus" mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
echo "amuxbus inout lines (should be 0)"
grep "^wire clk_amuxbus_a" mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v && echo "wire declaration OK"` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

echo "=== Restoring compute_ss.v from git (line 313 has stray 0) ==="
git checkout HEAD -- mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v
echo "Restore status: $?"

echo ""
echo "=== Verify line 313 is now blank ==="
sed -n '311,315p' mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | cat -n

echo ""
echo "=== Also check wrapper.v is still patched (amuxbus ports removed) ==="
grep -c "inout.*amuxbus" mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
echo "amuxbus inout lines (should be 0)"
grep "^wire clk_amuxbus_a" mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v && echo "wire declaration OK"
